opportunity.title: I wrote a open source iMessage for your AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge with routing through a custom protocol like iMessage will be handling rate limiting and protocol evolution – expect to spend significant effort on resilience and backwards compatibility. Consider the implications for message ordering too; naive routing can easily introduce subtle latency issues if not carefully managed. It's a fascinating architectural problem, essentially building a distributed cognitive network.
actions.reasoning: My work involves routing LLM requests across providers and building agent tooling, so this topic aligns directly with my expertise.
